# landscape_repository_profile (Resource)

Manages a Landscape repository profile, which groups pockets and associates them with computers.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `title` (String) Title for the repository profile.

### Optional

- `access_group` (String) Access group to create the profile in.
- `all_computers` (Boolean) Whether to apply the profile to all computers.
- `description` (String) Description of the profile.
- `distribution` (String) Name of the distribution the series belongs to. Required when `pockets` is set.
- `pockets` (List of String) Pocket names to add to this profile (e.g. `["release", "updates"]`).
- `series` (String) Name of the series the pockets belong to. Required when `pockets` is set.
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags used to target computers.

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) The slug name of the profile returned by the API.
